## What & why

<!-- What does this change and why? Link any issue: Fixes #123 -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `dart format .` applied
- [ ] `flutter analyze --fatal-infos` is clean
- [ ] `flutter test` passes
- [ ] Re-ran `build_runner` if I touched `@riverpod`/`@freezed` files
- [ ] No secrets committed (no real `firebase_options.dart` / `google-services.json` / plist)
- [ ] Added/updated tests for new catalog widgets or logic
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` and docs if behavior changed
